title: Payload — cypherx.tenant.deleted
description: Contract 13 tenant-lifecycle payload. Emitted by Auth on px0 `org.deleted`, admin action, or self-serve close-account + 30-day grace. On consumption all services run their bulk-wipe handler against the tenant (GDPR right to erasure). Carried inside the Kafka event envelope `payload` field. Forward-compatible: tolerates unknown fields (additionalProperties:true).

tenant_id.description: Isolation-boundary UUID of the deleted tenant (Contract 13).

deleted_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) at which the tenant deletion took effect.

grace_started_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) at which the 30-day grace period began (for self-serve close-account).
